title: gastrochilus flabelliformis
intro: Gastrochilus flabelliformis, also known as the Fan Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus flabelliformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
